song.title: Father Abraham
song.lyrics:
[V1] Father Abraham had many sons Many sons had father Abraham I am one of them, and so are you So lets all praise the Lord Right hand... Right hand... Left hand... Right hand... Left hand... Right foot... Right hand... Left hand... Right foot... Left foot...
[V2] Father Abraham had many sons Many sons had father Abraham I am one of them, and so are you So lets all praise the Lord Right hand. Left hand. Right foot. Left foot. Chin up... Right hand. Left hand. Right foot. Left foot. Chin up Turn Around... Right hand. Left hand. Right foot. Left foot. Chin up Turn Around... Sit down!
